---
title: "nitrix.stats.ordinal"
generated: true
signature-hash: 9c9758d25e8dcbc1
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.ordinal`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `Km1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `OrdinalResult` {#OrdinalResult}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:OrdinalResult -->
```python
class OrdinalResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:OrdinalResult -->
Per-element ordinal (cumulative-link) fit output.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:OrdinalResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(coef: Float[Array, 'V p'], thresholds: Float[Array, 'V Km1'], cov_coef: Float[Array, 'V p p'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], n_obs: int, n_classes: int, link: str) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `ordinal_fit` {#ordinal_fit}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ordinal_fit -->
```python
ordinal_fit(Y: Int[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, n_classes: int, link: str = 'logit', n_iter: int = 50, ridge: float = 1e-08, block: Optional[int] = None) -> OrdinalResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ordinal_fit -->
Mass-univariate ordinal regression (cumulative-link / proportional odds).

Fits, per element, the ordered-categorical model `P(y_v <= k) =
F(theta_k - X beta_v)` for `y_v in {0, .., K-1}`, with `F` the logistic
(`link='logit'`) or normal (`link='probit'`) CDF.  `X` carries **no**
intercept (the `K - 1` thresholds absorb it).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ordinal_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Y` | `Int` | `V` × `N` | — | `(V, N)` ordered class labels in `{0, .., n_classes-1}`. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` shared design (no intercept column). |
| `n_classes` | `int` | — | — | Number of ordered classes `K` (`>= 2`). |
| `link` | `str` | — | `'logit'` | `'logit'` (proportional odds, default) or `'probit'` (ordered probit). |
| `n_iter` | `int` | — | `50` | Newton iterations (default `50`). |
| `ridge` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Small stabiliser on the Newton / information solves. |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Optional element-block size bounding peak memory. |

**Returns** `OrdinalResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `ordinal_predict` {#ordinal_predict}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ordinal_predict -->
```python
ordinal_predict(result: OrdinalResult, X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, type: Literal['class_prob', 'cum_prob', 'class'] = 'class_prob') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ordinal_predict -->
Per-element ordinal prediction on a (new) design `X`.

Applies the fitted cumulative-link model `P(y <= j) = F(theta_j - X beta)`
(`F` the stored `result.link` CDF) at the new design and returns,
per `type`:

- `'class_prob'` (default): the per-class simplex `P(y = k)`, shape
  `(V, N, K)` -- the diff of the cumulative probabilities.
- `'cum_prob'`: the cumulative probabilities `P(y <= j)` for the
  `K - 1` interior thresholds, shape `(V, N, K - 1)`.
- `'class'`: the arg-max class label, shape `(V, N)` (**non**
  -differentiable -- a hard label).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ordinal_predict -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `result` | `OrdinalResult` | — | — | An :class:`OrdinalResult` from :func:`ordinal_fit`. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` design (no intercept column, as at fit -- the thresholds absorb it). |
| `type` | `Literal['class_prob', 'cum_prob', 'class']` | — | `'class_prob'` | Output kind (see above). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
